data.body: SC7 documentation scope: COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md must document the Jira-Ticket and DSO-Task git trailer behavior introduced by cab1-600f — specifically: which fields populate each trailer, that trailers are omitted (not errored) when source values are unavailable, and that the blank-line separator is added automatically by git interpret-trailers. Done definition addition: COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md contains a section describing trailer injection behavior consistent with the implementation in cab1-600f.
